creator: micahjon@ywave.com
text:
I've just experienced a similar crash in Thunderbird 1.5.0.8, but this 
time it's in regard to a file open dialog. Trying to attach more than 
one file to an outgoing email in TBird (which results in more than one 
open dialog) will result in a similar crash with a similar backtrace. It 
seems that maybe the Mozilla products are having dialog conflicts with GTK.
